message:
bd-ml2r.10.2: implement deterministic FNX analysis cache

Cache implementation (fnx_cache.rs):
- FNV-1a hash-keyed cache keyed by IR topology + config
- LRU eviction with configurable max entries (default 64)
- O(1) generation-counter clear
- Tracks hits/misses/evictions for instrumentation

Features:
- CacheKey from IR structure (nodes, edges, diagram type)
- Separate slots for diagnostics and criticality results
- Disabled mode for bypassing cache entirely
- Full test coverage: determinism, eviction, stats

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
